expectedDifferences.reason: Shopify emits opaque connection cursors while the local replay uses deterministic ShopifyFunction ID cursors.
Shopify emits opaque connection cursors while the local replay uses deterministic ShopifyFunction ID cursors.

notes: HAR-416 live Shopify evidence captured after deploying released validation and cart-transform Function extensions in the repo-local conformance app. The executable parity request first verifies the cold upstream-forwarded shopifyFunction/shopifyFunctions response, then replays the same captured no-apiType shopifyFunctions request after metadata hydration so the local read path must return all API types instead of defaulting to VALIDATION. Function WASM, checkout cart transforms, validation logic, and tax callbacks are not executed. Mutation probes now record live Shopify userErrors for wrong Function API type, unknown/unowned Function handles, invalid validation/cart-transform metafields, and duplicate cart-transform registration. Shopify allowed duplicate validation creates for the same Function in this shop, and taxAppConfigure remains authority-blocked because the caller must be a tax calculations app.
